title: lotononis alpina subsp. multiflora
intro: Lotononis alpina subsp. multiflora is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the pea or bean family. It is a flowering plant native to Southern Africa, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant contains compounds with antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which provide various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Lotononis alpina subsp. multiflora include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
